calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

John P. Zanghi, Esq., for the Plaintiff Conard House, Incorporated.
Witness: Paul Schmidt sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant David Calk.
The court ordered Defendants Does 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 42 Wahburn Street, #106, city and county of San Francisco, CA 94103.

Holdover damages $864.96
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $315.00
for a Total Judgment of $1,179.96
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Peter J. Busch; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Conard House, Inc. is present. Represented by Trina Jones.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant David Calk DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of OCT-07-2013 remains on calendar. (D501)
